markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review November performance and align on new SEO priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New SEO Priority:** Audit and consolidate legacy "solution" pages into new "product" pages to regain rankings for high-intent commercial terms (e.g., "board management software").](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**November Performance:** Traffic was steady with high engagement (\~50% engaged sessions). New content refreshes saw strong growth (\>200% MoM), and Diligent remains a dominant citation in LLM results.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Competitor Content Strategy:** To mitigate legal risk, all competitor claims will be sourced from neutral, external sites like G2 and Capterra. Outbound links will be `nofollow`.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Image Production:** GrowthX will now create on-brand infographics using AI (e.g., Nano Banana) to address internal bandwidth constraints.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

## Topics

### November Performance Review

  - [**Overall Traffic & Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Sessions were steady, with \~50% classified as engaged (multi-page visits or key events).](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [November was the second-best month for traffic in 2023, behind October.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [**Organic Search (GSC):**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - Queries ranking \#1 grew 32% MoM.
      - Queries ranking \#2–10 declined 27% MoM → Vivek will investigate for content decay.
  - [**Top Content & Conversions:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
      - [**Top Post:** "Singapore AI regulation" → confirms strong performance for regulation-focused topics in both organic and LLM results.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
      - [**Top Converting Page:** "Enterprise risk compliance" (11 lead form submissions).](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
      - [**Action:** Verify the "lead form submission" event tracks high-intent actions (e.g., demo requests) vs. top-funnel downloads to assess lead quality.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**LLM Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
      - [Diligent remains a dominant citation in non-branded prompts, significantly outperforming Onboard.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Refresh content in the "Board meeting management techniques" cluster to counter recent performance drops.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### New SEO Priority: Page Consolidation

  - [**Problem:** The sunsetting of legacy "solution" pages has caused a loss of rankings for high-intent commercial terms (e.g., "board management software").](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Goal:** Consolidate SEO authority from old pages into the new "product" pages to regain rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [**Audit:** Review all legacy solution pages to identify consolidation opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [**Redirects:** Update all internal links to point directly to new product pages, bypassing redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
          - [**Product Pages:** Target both product-specific and commercial terms.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
          - [**Diligent1 Page:** Target broad "GRC platform" terms to reinforce topical authority.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Align all content refreshes with the new page structure and GRC messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Competitor Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Internal legal feedback requires competitor claims to be sourced from neutral, external voices to mitigate risk.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [Cite user reviews and data from third-party sites like G2 and Capterra.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [Use `nofollow` links for all outbound competitor citations.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Image Production Process

  - [**Problem:** Internal bandwidth constraints limit the ability to create custom images for content.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will now create on-brand infographics using AI tools (e.g., Nano Banana).](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [**Process:** Diligent provides a blank Canva template and a completed example for style guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**kfarnham (Diligent):**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [Send the legacy solution page keyword list to GrowthX via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [Provide the blank Canva template and a completed example to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
      - [Verify the "lead form submission" event in GA4 tracks high-intent actions.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [Conduct an audit of legacy solution pages to identify consolidation opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
      - [Implement the new competitor content strategy (external sources, `nofollow` links).](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - Investigate the 27% decline in GSC queries ranking \#2–10.
      - [Refresh content in the "Board meeting management techniques" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/BzwDcsXt1Bn6xcuUxBE4UyBJ6Vt25Mno?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
